metadata.title:
HILL TO BUILD TO


sIMILKAMEEN COUNTRY

pages.raw_text:
President James j. Hill of the
Great Northern was in Spokane
short time Sunday afternoon on his
return from the Sound. While In
specting his new depot here he gave
out the information that his COM
pany will commence in the spring the
construction of new road through
the Okanogan country into British
Columbia and up the Similkameen
river. He also intimated that in the
near future the road will be extended
to Vancouver. He said the company
Is now perfecting the arrangements
for building the new road and the
work will begin early in the spring.


Affairs in the traffic world have
been shaping themselves of late as
though the Northern Securities COM
pany had obtained a controlling in
terest in the Wisconsin Central rail-
way. j. J. Hill Of the Great North
ern denies the report. 81
